Tool.note: Wrapper class — CustomToolDefinition wraps the spec Tool schema with additional routing logic.

TextBlock.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

ToolResultBlockParamContentVariant0.note: Anonymous spec variant — not a named schema, represents text content within tool results.

ToolResultBlockParamContentVariant1.note: Anonymous spec variant — not a named schema, represents image/document content within tool results.

WebSearchResult.note: content is anyOf: List<WebSearchResultItem> (success) or Map with type=web_search_tool_result_error (error). fromJson accepts Object, not Map.

array of ResponseWebSearchResultBlock.note: content is anyOf: List<WebSearchResultItem> (success) or Map with type=web_search_tool_result_error (error). fromJson accepts Object, not Map.

ResponseWebSearchToolResultError.note: content is anyOf: List<WebSearchResultItem> (success) or Map with type=web_search_tool_result_error (error). fromJson accepts Object, not Map.

ImageSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

Base64ImageSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

URLImageSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

DocumentSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

PingEvent.note: No named schema in spec — the ping event has no dedicated schema definition.

ErrorEvent.note: No named schema in spec — the error event uses a non-standard nested error object structure.

ThinkingDisplayMode.note: Enum for thinking display mode — used as optional field on ThinkingConfigEnabled and ThinkingConfigAdaptive

CapabilitySupport.note: Simple helper type used within ModelCapabilities

ModelCapabilities.note: Model capability information returned on ModelInfo

ToolCaller.note: ServerToolCaller is a catch-all for non-direct types (versioned tool callers). DirectToolCaller is the default when type is absent.

DirectToolCaller.note: No named schema in spec — DirectToolCaller is the default when type is absent.

ServerToolCaller.note: Defaults to 'direct' when type is absent.

ToolDefinition.note: Non-standard type_prefix discriminator — detects built-in vs custom by checking if type starts with known prefixes (bash_, web_search_, etc.).

various built-in tool schemas.note: Virtual grouping entry — individual built-in tool types are mapped separately.

BuiltInTool.note: Parent sealed class not a named schema in spec — built-in tools use versioned type strings as discriminators.

AdvisorToolResultContent.note: Discriminated union for advisor tool result content

BetaRequestAdvisorResultBlock.note: Request variant maps to same Dart class as Response variant

BetaRequestAdvisorRedactedResultBlock.note: Request variant maps to same Dart class as Response variant

BetaRequestAdvisorToolResultError.note: Request variant maps to same Dart class as Response variant

BetaAdvisorMessageIterationUsage.note: Modeled as IterationUsage with optional model field; type discriminator 'advisor_message' is a string value, not a separate class

MessageContent.note: fromJson accepts dynamic: String → TextMessageContent, List → BlocksMessageContent.

MessageContent:TextMessageContent.note: fromJson accepts dynamic: String → TextMessageContent, List → BlocksMessageContent.

MessageContent:BlocksMessageContent.note: fromJson accepts dynamic: String → TextMessageContent, List → BlocksMessageContent.

SystemPrompt.note: fromJson accepts dynamic: String → TextSystemPrompt, List → BlocksSystemPrompt.

SystemPrompt:TextSystemPrompt.note: fromJson accepts dynamic: String → TextSystemPrompt, List → BlocksSystemPrompt.

SystemPrompt:BlocksSystemPrompt.note: fromJson accepts dynamic: String → TextSystemPrompt, List → BlocksSystemPrompt.

BetaRefusalStopDetails.note: Unified with non-beta RefusalStopDetails — identical schema.

BetaFileMetadataSchema.note: Unified with FileMetadata — scope field added.

AddSessionResource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

AddSessionResourceParams.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

Base64DocumentSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

DocumentBlock.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

FileDocumentSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

FileImageSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

GetSessionResource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

ImageBlock.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

InputEvent.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

Model.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

ModelConfigParams.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

PlainTextDocumentSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

Struct.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

ToolResultContentBlock.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

URLDocumentSource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

UpdateSessionResource.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

UserContentBlock.note: Content block / API wrapper - used as Map<String, dynamic>

BetaCreateMessageParams.note: Beta variant of CreateMessageParams; MessageCreateRequest covers the shared surface. Beta-only fields (context_management, mcp_servers, output_format) are not yet implemented.

BetaOutputConfig.note: Beta variant of OutputConfig; same Dart class covers both surfaces.

EffortLevel.note: EffortLevel enum uses strict fromJson (FormatException on unknown values) matching the convention of ServiceTier/Speed enums in this package.

BetaEffortLevel.note: Beta variant of EffortLevel enum; same Dart enum covers both surfaces.

BetaEffortCapability.note: Beta variant of EffortCapability within ModelCapabilities; same Dart class covers both surfaces.

BetaManagedAgentsCreateMemoryStoreRespon.note: Single-variant oneOf response wrapper around BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore — unwrapped to MemoryStore at the resource layer.

BetaManagedAgentsUpdateMemoryStoreRespon.note: Single-variant oneOf response wrapper around BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore — unwrapped to MemoryStore at the resource layer.

BetaManagedAgentsArchiveMemoryStoreRespo.note: Single-variant oneOf response wrapper around BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore — unwrapped to MemoryStore at the resource layer.

BetaManagedAgentsGetMemoryStoreResponse.note: Single-variant oneOf response wrapper around BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore — unwrapped to MemoryStore at the resource layer.

BetaManagedAgentsDeleteMemoryStoreRespon.note: Single-variant oneOf response wrapper around BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemoryStore — unwrapped to DeletedMemoryStore at the resource layer.

BetaManagedAgentsError.note: Error envelope union — errors are surfaced via AnthropicException by the ErrorInterceptor, not parsed from response bodies.

BetaManagedAgentsErrorResponse.note: Error response envelope — errors are surfaced via AnthropicException by the ErrorInterceptor, not parsed from response bodies.
